---
title: "About"
image: profile.png
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com
---

Welcome to my math blog! Here I share my explorations in mathematics, statistics, data science, and programming.
